violations.text: The floors in the walk-in cooler were observed with exposed cement, which is not durable, easily cleanable, or non-absorbent. The materials for indoor floors must be durable, easily cleanable and nonabsorbent for areas subject to moisture such as food preparation areas, walk-in refrigerators, ware-washing areas, and toilet rooms. New Violation. Correct By: 11/18/2025
A strainer was observed in the hand-washing sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/22/2025

The following was observed: 1) Various food items were observed held at 45-47 degrees Fahrenheit. The reach-in cooler was observed at 45 degrees Fahrenheit at ambient temperature. Per PIC, foods were held in the unit overnight and voluntarily disposed of. 2) single use half and half cups labeled "KEEP REFRIGERATED" were observed held at room temperature at the dining tables. Person in charge voluntarily disposed of items. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/22/2025

Proper cooling methods were not used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. Hollandaise sauce was observed cooling in containers greater than four inches deep on the counter. Sauce moved to shallow pans to properly cool before placing in the refrigerator. New Violation. Correct By: 10/22/2025

The single door reach-in refrigerator unit was observed in poor repair (maintaining ambient temperature of 45 degrees Fahrenheit). The equipment must be in good repair and proper adjustment. New Violation. Correct By: 10/22/2025

The floors in the walk-in cooler were observed with exposed cement, which is not durable, easily cleanable, or non-absorbent. The materials for indoor floors must be durable, easily cleanable and nonabsorbent for areas subject to moisture such as food preparation areas, walk-in refrigerators, ware-washing areas, and toilet rooms. New Violation. Correct By: 11/05/2025
